# Level 5 — The Bell Tower
# New mechanic: primarily VERTICAL level. Player climbs up instead of going right.
# Each platform is 3-4 tiles above the last (within jump height of 4 tiles).
# Horizontal gap between zigzag platforms = 5-6 tiles (needs run-jump, not stand jump).
# Enemies are placed on platforms making them dangerous to land on.
# Vow Stone is at the very top — falling resets to bottom (pit death triggers respawn).
# Low ceiling at top section forces crouching-style timing (no crouch system, just jump arc)
# Width: 42 cols | Height: 22 rows
